links.title: useForm
links.description: The primary React Hook Form hook. Initialize your form with validation rules, default values, and submission handling in a single call.

links.title: useController
links.description: React hook for building reusable controlled inputs with full access to field value, validation state, and form state from React Hook Form.

links.title: reset
links.description: Reset the entire form to default values, clearing all errors, dirty fields, and touched state in React Hook Form.

links.title: Watch
links.description: A React component that subscribes to form input changes and re-renders only its children, scoping updates for better performance.

links.title: trigger
links.description: Manually trigger validation for one field, a list of fields, or the entire React Hook Form without submitting.

links.title: useLens
links.description: Type-safe functional lenses that scope form context to a nested field path, reducing boilerplate in deeply nested React Hook Forms.

links.title: createFormControl
links.description: Create standalone React Hook Form state outside of a React component, useful for global or shared form state management across your app.

links.title: Form
links.description: React Hook Form's Form component handles submission to a URL or callback, with built-in loading, error, and success state management.

links.title: useFormState
links.description: Subscribe to specific form state properties and isolate re-renders at the component level for better performance in large React Hook Forms.

links.title: control
links.description: The control object returned by useForm, required to register controlled inputs via the Controller component and useController hook.

links.title: unregister
links.description: Remove a registered input from React Hook Form, optionally preserving its value, error, dirty, or touched state on unmount.

links.title: getFieldState
links.description: Get the current validation and interaction state of a specific field — invalid, isDirty, isTouched, and error — from React Hook Form.

links.title: setValue
links.description: Dynamically update a registered field's value with options to trigger validation, mark the field dirty, or set it as touched.

links.title: resetField
links.description: Reset a single field's value and state — errors, dirty, and touched — independently without resetting the entire React Hook Form.

links.title: clearErrors
links.description: Manually clear validation errors for one field, an array of fields, or the entire React Hook Form without triggering re-validation.

links.title: setFocus
links.description: Programmatically focus any registered input field, with an option to also select its current value in React Hook Form.

links.title: useFormContext
links.description: Access all useForm methods deep in the component tree without prop drilling, using React Hook Form's built-in context API.

links.title: useFieldArray
links.description: React hook for dynamic field arrays. Append, prepend, insert, remove, swap, move, update, and replace fields with optimized performance.

links.title: ErrorMessage
links.description: Render validation error messages for a registered field. Supports multiple errors per field and custom message rendering in React Hook Form.

links.title: Controller
links.description: Wrapper component for integrating controlled external inputs like MUI, Chakra UI, and React-Select with React Hook Form validation.

links.title: FormProvider
links.description: Wrap your form tree with FormProvider to share useForm methods across deeply nested components without passing props manually.

links.title: watch
links.description: Subscribe to one or more input value changes and trigger re-renders. Useful for conditional form logic and dependent field calculations.

links.title: useWatch
links.description: Subscribe to input value changes with isolated component-level re-renders, offering better performance than watch for large React Hook Forms.

links.title: subscribe
links.description: Subscribe to React Hook Form state changes outside the render cycle — ideal for analytics, side effects, and non-React integrations.

links.title: setValues
links.description: Update multiple React Hook Form field values at once using an object or a callback that receives the current form values and returns changes.

links.title: setError
links.description: Manually set a validation error on one or multiple fields, with support for server-side and custom errors in React Hook Form.

links.title: handleSubmit
links.description: Validate form inputs and invoke your submit callback with typed form data, or pass errors to an error handler on validation failure.

links.title: formState
links.description: Access real-time form state including isDirty, isValid, errors, isSubmitting, touchedFields, and dirtyFields from React Hook Form.

links.title: getValues
links.description: Read current form values without subscribing to re-renders. Retrieve a single field, multiple fields, or the entire form data object.

links.title: API Documentation
links.description: Complete API reference for React Hook Form — hooks, methods, and TypeScript types.

links.title: register
links.description: Register an input with React Hook Form to enable validation, value tracking, and form submission. Supports text, checkbox, select, and more.

links.title: FormStateSubscribe
links.description: A renderless React component that subscribes to form state changes and re-renders children only when the relevant state updates occur.
